metadata.title: Manufacturing MRP | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered manufacturing and MRP platform for all your production operations — from master production scheduling and work orders to quality control, shop floor management, and traceability.

hero.title: The
hero.description: Plan, manufacture, control quality, manage shop floor operations, and improve production with a simple modern MRP system.

dashboard.title: Manufacturing
dashboard.subtitle: Orders / Work Centers / Planning / Quality / Shop Floor

hero.floatingNote: Check all operations in real time

simulationSection.title: Real-time
simulationSection.description: Simulate manufacturing orders with real-time capacity, inventory, components, work centers, and schedule constraints before execution.

planningSection.title: Planning that puts you ahead of schedule
planningSection.description: Schedule manufacturing orders, reserve components, balance work centers, and see production timing before problems happen.

productionSection.title: Record
productionSection.description: Register each production operation, consume components, record finished products, print labels, and keep traceability clean from start to finish.

paperlessSection.title: Become a
paperlessSection.description: Give operators everything they need directly on screen: instructions, components, checks, drawings, notes, and validation actions.

qualitySection.title: Get ready for
qualitySection.description: Cut costs, reduce waste, detect quality issues, and ensure every product meets your standards. Track checks directly inside your production process.

features.title: Master production schedule
features.description: Plan demand, production, components, and expected stock with a clear manufacturing schedule.

features.title: Powerful yet simple
features.description: Manage manufacturing orders, work orders, planning, and quality from one clean interface.

features.title: Leverage by-products
features.description: Produce finished goods and by-products with accurate costing and inventory tracking.

features.title: Up/down stream traceability
features.description: Track components, lots, serial numbers, and finished products across every production step.

features.title: IoT integrations
features.description: Connect shop floor devices, scanners, quality tools, and machines to your manufacturing flow.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Adon allowed our company to efficiently manage a growth from a turnover of $2.4M to $10M in 4 years.
testimonial.name: Andrew Morgan
